vocab.meaning: gói gọn/tóm gọn được cái hồn của sự vật
vocab.example: I love taking photos of the sunrise because it allows me to encapsulate the essence of a new beginning.
Misty mornings in the highlands often provide ethereal lighting that makes every shot look like a masterpiece.

vocab.meaning: sự cân bằng về bố cục
vocab.example: When capturing vast landscapes, I pay close attention to compositional balance to ensure the viewer's eye is led through the scene.
Photography is my way of preserving the ephemeral beauty of a double rainbow or a passing storm.

vocab.meaning: lối kể chuyện bằng hình ảnh
vocab.example: I try to create a visual narrative through my landscape photos, telling a story of how the land has changed over time.

vocab.word: the play of light and shadow
vocab.meaning: sự đan xen/vũ điệu của ánh sáng và bóng tối
vocab.example: I am fascinated by the play of light and shadow on the rugged surfaces of mountain cliffs during the golden hour.

vocab.meaning: có con mắt tinh tường/nhạy bén về
vocab.example: To be a good nature photographer, one must have a keen eye for subtle details that others might overlook.

vocab.meaning: sức mạnh khơi gợi (cảm xúc, ký ức)
vocab.example: A well-taken picture of the sea has the evocative power to transport me back to that moment of complete serenity.

vocab.meaning: vùng hoang dã nguyên sơ/chưa bị xâm hại
vocab.example: I find immense joy in trekking to remote areas to document the raw beauty of unspoiled wilderness.

vocab.meaning: sự thưởng thức/trân trọng vẻ đẹp thẩm mỹ
vocab.example: Taking scenery pictures has deepened my aesthetic appreciation for the diverse topographies of our planet.
